dependency_routes.summary: Ch03 local witnesses feed evidence, which feeds the chapter tile and handoff, which then feeds query/runtime exposure.
Ch10 local witnesses feed evidence, which feeds the chapter tile and handoff, which then feeds query/runtime exposure.
Ch12 local witnesses feed evidence, which feeds the chapter tile and handoff, which then feeds query/runtime exposure.
Ch14 local witnesses feed evidence, which feeds the chapter tile and handoff, which then feeds query/runtime exposure.
Ch12 is the template branch. Its lens readiness and closure mode become the delta baseline for Ch03, Ch10, and Ch14.
